sub_modules.nr_poly_eval: Combinational fixed-point cubic polynomial evaluator using Horner form.
sub_modules.nr_derivative_eval: Combinational fixed-point derivative evaluator for a1 + 2*a2*x + 3*a3*x^2.
sub_modules.nr_fixed_div: Combinational fixed-point divider used for the Newton update p(x)/p'(x).
sub_modules.nr_convergence_check: Combinational absolute-value tolerance check for iteration convergence.
sub_modules.nr_root_verify: Combinational verification block checking whether |p(root)| is within tolerance.
